# Dca

**Summary**: A multivariate analysis technique used to visualize gradients in ecological data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] used DCA to reveal a salinity gradient along axis 1 and a confinement gradient along axis 2.

## Key Results and Findings

- DCA revealed that the reference site showed more association with the second axis (confinement). ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 50]])
